channel.title: PowerShell 7.6 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in PowerShell 7.6 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: Azure Functions Support for PowerShell 7.6
item.description:
Azure Functions now supports PowerShell 7.6 in public preview. You can develop locally with PowerShell 7.6 and deploy to Azure Functions plans.

  • Source: Azure Updates
